subject: [PATCH v5 04/21] zswap: add new helpers for zswap entry operations

2026-03-20.patch_summary: This patch adds new helper functions to abstract away zswap entry operations, making it easier to re-implement these functions when swap is virtualized. The helpers include storing, loading, erasing, and checking if a zswap entry is empty. These functions use the xarray data structure to manage the zswap entries. The patch modifies several existing functions in the mm/zswap.c file to use these new helpers, reducing code duplication and improving maintainability.
